title: Eva Unit 2 Beast Mode
wikitext:
[]: Eva Unit 2 Beast Mode.             Quote Post by Craftee » Sun Mar 23, 2014 5:04 am neck teeth? lol? edit: why was it moved? isnt this chitchat? SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by Th3Marauder » Sun Mar 23, 2014 9:02 am Those are staples that held Unit-02s mouth shut, this has been discussed pretty heavily. Staples also showed up with Unit-03 choking Unit-01 as the Ninth Angel.

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Sun Mar 23, 2014 5:12 pm More here: http://forum.evageeks.org/post/651776/333-Things-you-noticed/#651776 http://forum.evageeks.org/post/373162/Interesting-little-details-in-2XX/#373162

[]:             Quote Post by Craftee » Sun Mar 23, 2014 5:44 pm Th3Marauder wrote: Those are staples that held Unit-02s mouth shut, this has been discussed pretty heavily. Staples also showed up with Unit-03 choking Unit-01 as the Ninth Angel.

[]:             Quote Post by Th3Marauder » Mon Mar 24, 2014 2:05 am Craftee wrote: i doubt they are staples. these are white and different shape, the one on unit 3 are black.
